content: Remote OK Architectural Designer Assistant Archisearch Architectural Designer / Interior Architect (Remote)<br><br>Full-Time | Remote | Independent Contractor<br><br>We are looking for a talented Architectural Designer /Architectural Assistant/ Interior Architect to join our team remotely and contribute to high-end residential and boutique commercial projects in Greece and Cyprus. Our approach is to empower exceptional candidates to excel in a role by leveraging their strengths, regardless of whether they precisely match a job description. As a result, we welcome applicants with varying levels of experience, both exceeding and falling short of the requirements outlined below.<br><br>PixelPiew is a privately owned studio specializing in design, branding, and creative services. Our mission is to drive the evolution and prosperity of financial services, B2B, corporate, and non-profit organizations. We achieve this by harnessing the power of research and craftsmanship to create refined brand identities, websites, messaging, campaigns, and marketing materials.<br><br>We Want<br><br>We Are Actively Seeking Skilled And Enthusiastic Freelance Designers To Join Our Roster Of Creative Professionals. This Is a Broad Application, And We Invite All Designers To Apply, With a Special Emphasis On Those Who Excel In The Following Areas<br><br><ul><li> Logo and Brand Design</li><li> Motion Graphics Design</li><li> UX Design</li><li> Print Collateral Design</li><li> PowerPoint/Google Slides Presentation Design<br><br></li></ul>Please be aware that while we may not be able to respond to every applicant immediately, we will retain all submissions for potential future opportunities. If you are passionate about design and are eager to tackle exciting and demanding projects, we sincerely encourage you to reach out to us!<br><br><strong>Compensation<br><br></strong>This is a freelance, remote position, but you are also welcome to work on-site at our Providence, RI location if you prefer. We offer competitive compensation that aligns with your level of expertise and experience.<br><br>How to Apply<br><br>To apply, please email careers@pixelpier.com, including your resume and portfolio. To test your attention to detail and show that youâve read this entire listing, please also share your favorite typeface and explain why it resonates with you.<br><br>We are interested in hearing from individual applicants and kindly request that recruiters, agencies, and offshore firms refrain from applying.<br><br><ul><li> PixelPier is committed to equal employment opportunities and does not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment based on factors such as race, color, religion, national origin, age, gender, sex, ancestry, citizenship status, mental or physical disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, veteran status, or military status. We actively seek individuals to join our team and do not engage with recruiters, agencies, or offshore firms in our hiring process.</li></ul> virtual assistant, design, vfx Time, 2026-06-25T12:19:33+00:00 1134112 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-freelance-designer-la-vena-creativa-1134112 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Freelance Transcriptionist â Sinhalese Perle <strong>About Perle<br><br></strong>Perle is an AI infrastructure company building expert-driven training data, evaluation systems, and applied AI products for the world's leading labs and enterprises. Headquartered in San Francisco with experts across more than forty markets, we specialize in the work that requires real human judgment: domain expertise, linguistic nuance, and cultural fidelity that generic data vendors cannot deliver.<br><br>Perle is hiring a freelance transcriptionist fluent in Sinhalese for a remote transcription role. This is a paid contract position open to qualified contributors worldwide.<br><br><ul><li> Role Overview<br><br></li></ul>You will transcribe 2-speaker, channel-separated audio recordings in Sinhalese. Each file has two clearly separated speakers. Your job is to produce a clean, accurate, sequentially ordered transcript with speaker labels and timestamps.<br><br><ul><li> What You Will Do</li><li>Listen to 2-speaker audio recordings in Sinhalese</li><li>Type out what each speaker says, accurately and in full</li><li>Label each speaker turn as Speaker 1 or Speaker 2, matching the audio channel</li><li>Add timestamps at the start of each speaker turn (format: HH:MM:SS)</li><li>Ensure transcripts are sequential with no unexplained gaps</li><li> Requirements</li><li>Native or near-native fluency in Sinhalese (spoken and written)</li><li>Strong written Sinhalese â accurate spelling, punctuation, and grammar</li><li>Ability to work independently and meet daily output targets</li><li>Access to a computer with a stable internet connection</li><li>Availability for at least 4 hours per day</li><li>Prior transcription experience is a plus but not required â all contributors must pass a qualification test</li><li> Quality Standard</li><li>Word Error Rate (WER) of 5% or less on all delivered transcripts</li><li>Zero speaker label errors â Speaker 1 must always correspond to Channel 1</li><li>Transcripts reviewed on a rolling basis; feedback provided promptly</li><li>Files that do not meet the quality threshold will be returned for correction</li><li> Project Details<br><br></li></ul><strong><strong>Detail<br><br></strong></strong><strong><strong>Inform
